sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ مَعْرِفَةُ مَبَادِئِ الْإِسْعَافَاتِ الْأَوَّلِيَّةِ مَهَارَةً حَيَوِيَّةً قَدْ تُنْقِذُ حَيَاةَ الْإِنْسَانِ فِي حَالَاتِ الطَّوَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Poznavanje principa prve pomoći smatra se vitalnom vještinom koja može spasiti ljudski život u hitnim slučajevima.
sentences.translationEn: Knowing the principles of first aid is considered a vital skill that may save a person's life in emergencies.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَ تَعَرُّضِ شَخْصٍ مَا لِجُرْحٍ بَسِيطٍ، يَجِبُ تَنْظِيفُهُ جَيِّدًا بِالْمُطَهِّرِ ثُمَّ تَغْطِيَتُهُ بِضِمَادَةٍ نَظِيفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada je neko izložen manjoj rani, ona se mora dobro očistiti antiseptikom, a zatim prekriti čistim zavojem.
sentences.translationEn: When someone is exposed to a minor wound, it must be cleaned well with antiseptic and then covered with a clean bandage.

sentences.arabic: فِي حَالَةِ الْإِغْمَاءِ، يَنْبَغِي وَضْعُ الْمُصَابِ عَلَى ظَهْرِهِ وَرَفْعُ قَدَمَيْهِ قَلِيلًا لِتَسْهِيلِ تَدَفُّقِ الدَّمِ إِلَى الدِّمَاغِ.
sentences.translation: U slučaju nesvjestice, povrijeđenog treba položiti na leđa i malo mu podići noge kako bi se olakšao protok krvi u mozak.
sentences.translationEn: In case of fainting, the injured person should be placed on their back and their feet raised slightly to facilitate blood flow to the brain.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ أَيْضًا الِاتِّصَالُ بِفَرِيقِ الْإِسْعَافِ فَوْرًا إِذَا كَانَتِ الْإِصَابَةُ خَطِيرَةً أَوْ غَيْرَ مُسْتَقِرَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Također je neophodno odmah pozvati hitnu pomoć ako je povreda ozbiljna ili nestabilna.
sentences.translationEn: It is also necessary to call the ambulance team immediately if the injury is serious or unstable.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِفَاظَ بِحَقِيبَةِ إِسْعَافَاتٍ مُجَهَّزَةٍ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ وَالسَّيَّارَةِ يُعْتَبَرُ خُطْوَةً احْتِرَازِيَّةً ضَرُورِيَّةً لِلْغَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjedovanje opremljene torbe za prvu pomoć u kući i automobilu smatra se veoma neophodnom mjerom opreza.
sentences.translationEn: Keeping an equipped first aid kit at home and in the car is considered a very necessary precautionary step.
